workflow.name: Extract structured invoice JSON from PDFs with Mistral OCR and an LLM API
workflow.description:
# N8N AI LLM Unstructured Invoice data PDF OCR recognition to JSON output API

## What this workflow does
1. Accepts a PDF or image upload via Webhook as binary property "data"
2. Runs OCR with the Mistral OCR node
3. Normalizes OCR text
4. Sends OCR text to an LLM to extract structured JSON
5. Cleans and normalizes the JSON
6. Returns either:
   - status: ok
   - status: review_needed

## Setup
1. Import the workflow JSON into n8n
2. Create/attach Mistral AI credentials on the "Mistral OCR" node
3. Create/attach your choice LLM AI credentials on the OCR text to JSON converson node
4. Activate the workflow
5. POST a file to:
   /webhook/ocr-to-json

## Notes
- This starter is tuned for invoices/documents but can be adapted for receipts, purchase orders, or forms.
- Depending on your installed n8n version, the Mistral node parameter names may need minor adjustment after import.
- The workflow returns review_needed when confidence is below 0.5.

parameters.content: This webhook node Accepts a PDF or image upload via Webhook as binary property "data"

Runs OCR with the Mistral OCR node

Create/attach Mistral AI credentials on the "Mistral OCR" node

Normalizes OCR text

Sends OCR text to an LLM to extract structured JSON

Create/attach LLM AI credentials of your choice

Cleans and normalizes the JSON

Returns either:
   - status: ok
   - status: review_needed

- The workflow returns review_needed when confidence is below 0.5.

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
